message.content:
__Invites not counting?__

**On desktop**
- 📋   Press server title  ➜ Invite People ➜ Press "Copy Link"  :right_arrow:   Invite your friends! 
**On mobile**
- 📋  Press a channel  ➜  Then the name ➜ Press "invite members" ➜ Press Copy link :right_arrow:  Invite your friends!
